_comment: Edit this file to add or replace approved dependencies. Each entry MUST include a 'reason' field. The CI scanner blocks new package.json deps not on this list. @types/* packages are auto-allowed. The 'legacy' map carves out pre-existing banned deps that are tracked for removal in a separate cleanup commit; net-new additions of any dep in 'banned' fail CI.

@aws-sdk/client-s3.reason: AWS S3 client for object storage (backups, attachments)

@aws-sdk/client-secrets-manager.reason: AWS Secrets Manager client for runtime secret retrieval

@aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner.reason: Presigned URL generation for S3 uploads/downloads

@dnd-kit/sortable.reason: Sortable extension for the canonical @dnd-kit drag-and-drop

@nestjs/axios.reason: NestJS HTTP client wrapper around axios

@nestjs/cache-manager.reason: NestJS cache integration; pairs with cache-manager (W5.C)

@nestjs/config.reason: Canonical config loader for NestJS services

@nestjs/event-emitter.reason: In-process event bus used by automation/workflow services

@tanstack/react-table.reason: Canonical headless table primitive for grid views

argon2.reason: Canonical password hash; NEVER add bcrypt

bullmq.reason: Canonical job queue for automation/workflow workers

clsx.reason: Conditional className composition for React components

cookie-parser.reason: Cookie parsing for refresh-token / SSO flows

cors.reason: CORS middleware for cross-origin web client requests

dompurify.reason: HTML sanitization for rich-text fields and AVA-rendered output

exceljs.reason: Canonical .xlsx export for grid views and reports

expr-eval.reason: Sandboxed expression evaluator for formulas/automation (NEVER use eval)

framer-motion.reason: Animation primitives for the canonical UI

helmet.reason: Security headers middleware for all HTTP services

html2canvas.reason: Client-side rasterization for PDF export pipeline

jspdf.reason: Canonical PDF generation for client-side report export

jspdf-autotable.reason: Tabular layout plugin for the canonical jspdf

ldapts.reason: Canonical LDAP/AD client for SSO directory binds

lru-cache.reason: Browser-only LRU eviction (libs/ui); server code must use cache-manager (W5.C)

lucide-react.reason: Canonical icon set used in custom components alongside @mui/icons-material

openid-client.reason: Canonical OIDC client for SSO flows

qrcode.reason: QR code generation for MFA enrollment

reactflow.reason: Canonical node-graph editor for workflow / automation designers

reflect-metadata.reason: Required by NestJS DI and TypeORM decorators

unzipper.reason: Canonical archive extraction for change-package import

uuid.reason: UUID generation; pinned to ^11 (W4.C). Note: package.json currently shows ^13 - flagged for human review

zod.reason: Canonical schema validation for envelope/integration payloads

ajv.reason: JSON schema validation used by tooling and Nx

archiver.reason: Archive creation for change-package export tooling

eslint-config-prettier.reason: Disables ESLint rules conflicting with prettier

jest-environment-jsdom.reason: JSDOM jest environment for component tests

jest-environment-node.reason: Node jest environment for service tests

jest-util.reason: Jest internal utilities pinned for plugin compatibility

jiti.reason: Runtime TS loader for Nx config files

ts-node.reason: TS execution for tooling scripts (migrations, scanners)

vite.reason: Build tool for the web client

vite-plugin-dts.reason: Type-declaration generation for libs built with Vite

vite-plugin-pwa.reason: PWA assets for the web client

workbox-window.reason: Service worker registration for the PWA

bcrypt.reason: Use argon2 instead (canon W5.C dep registry)
Pre-existing banned dep tracked for removal in a separate cleanup commit; argon2 is canonical going forward

node-cache.reason: Pre-existing banned dep tracked for removal in a separate cleanup commit; cache-manager is canonical going forward

@hello-pangea/dnd.reason: Pre-existing banned dep tracked for removal in a separate cleanup commit; @dnd-kit/core is canonical going forward
